caption: Energetic Hungarian folk rock with violin and acoustic guitar, male vocals, driving rhythm section, traditional Eastern European scales
lyrics:
[verse]
Walking through the fields of gold
Where my ancestors roamed of old
The Tisza river calls my name
Nothing here has stayed the same

[chorus]
Rising like the morning sun
Fighting till the battle's won
Hungarian blood runs deep and true
Skies of red and white and green and blue

[verse]
Fire in the village square
Violines ring through the air
Dancing feet on cobblestone
Every heart has found its home

[chorus]
Rising like the morning sun
Fighting till the battle's won
Hungarian blood runs deep and true
Skies of red and white and green and blue

[bridge]
From the mountains to the plain
Through the sun and through the rain
We will carry on this song
To remind us where we belong

[chorus]
Rising like the morning sun
Fighting till the battle's won
Hungarian blood runs deep and true
Skies of red and white and green and blue

[outro]
The violin fades into the night
But the fire still burns bright
